en_title: You Can Now Fight Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick in WWE 2K26
subtitle: CEO亲自下场
opus_summary: Take-Two Interactive CEO Strauss Zelnick作为可玩角色加入《WWE 2K26》，玩家可操控或与他战斗。这位68岁的高管游戏内评分为77，但现实中非常健壮，每周锻炼10-12次，拥有专属入场曲《My Way》。Zelnick此前曾表示《WWE 2K》系列规模有望翻倍或三倍。

paragraphs.en: If you've ever wanted to fight a games industry CEO, now you can. Take-Two Interactive CEO Strauss Zelnick is now a playable character in WWE 2K26 , meaning you can either play as him or fight him yourself. There hasn't been any kind of official acknowledgement of his inclusion; he was simply quietly added in a new update today. The 68-year-old gaming executive holds an in-game rating of 77, meaning he's probably not going to claim any titles himself, but Zelnick is reportedly very fit in real life.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你曾想和游戏行业CEO打一架，现在机会来了。Take-Two Interactive CEO Strauss Zelnick现已作为可玩角色加入《WWE 2K26》，你可以操控他，也可以亲自与他战斗。官方并未正式宣布他的加入，他只是被悄悄添加到了今天的新更新中。这位68岁的游戏高管游戏内评分为77，这意味着他可能不会自己夺冠，但据报道，Zelnick在现实生活中非常健壮。

paragraphs.en: The CEO claims he works out 10 to 12 times a week (that's an average of almost twice a day, for those who aren't mathmaticians) and runs his own private workout club known as The Program. He's even written his own wellness book, Becoming Ageless: The Four Secrets To Looking and Feeling Younger Than Ever. All of this is to say he's pretty jacked, even though he's almost 70, and could probably fare better in a WWE ring than the average person.
paragraphs.cn: 这位CEO声称他每周锻炼10到12次（对不擅长数学的人来说，平均几乎每天两次），并经营着自己的私人健身俱乐部「The Program」。他甚至写了一本健康书籍《Becoming Ageless: The Four Secrets To Looking and Feeling Younger Than Ever》。总而言之，尽管他快70岁了，但身材相当健硕，在WWE擂台上可能比普通人表现更好。

paragraphs.en: Why did Zelnick get added into WWE 2K26? It's anyone's guess. He himself has admitted he isn't even a gamer, so it feels unlikely to be because he wants to play as himself. He seems like a decent sport, though, as he previously promoted the franchise's custom character creator with a silly video . However, this is the first time he's been added as an official character. He even sports his own exclusive entrance music in WWE 2K26, which is My Way by Frank Sinatra. The song was licensed seemingly just for Zelnick, as it can't be used for any other character in the game.
paragraphs.cn: 为什么Zelnick会被加入《WWE 2K26》？谁也说不准。他本人承认自己甚至不是游戏玩家，所以不太可能是他想扮演自己。不过，他似乎是个有风度的家伙，此前曾用一个搞笑的视频宣传该系列的自定义角色创建器。但这是他首次作为官方角色加入。他甚至在《WWE 2K26》中拥有专属入场曲——Frank Sinatra的《My Way》。这首歌似乎只为Zelnick授权，游戏中其他角色无法使用。

paragraphs.en: Take-Two Interactive owns Rockstar Games, 2K, and a number of other major studios, so Zelnick has overseen some of the biggest games of all-time. He is best known for being the only reputable source of information about GTA 6 outside of Rockstar Games itself. The hype for GTA 6 has led to many tuning into investor calls and listening to business-heavy interviews just so fans can hear Zelnick drop a few breadcrumbs here and there.
paragraphs.cn: Take-Two Interactive旗下拥有Rockstar Games、2K等多家大型工作室，因此Zelnick监督过一些有史以来最重磅的游戏。他最出名的是作为Rockstar Games之外唯一可靠的《GTA6》信息来源。《GTA6》的热度让许多人收听投资者电话会议和商业访谈，只为听Zelnick偶尔透露一点蛛丝马迹。

paragraphs.en: Zelnick also recently emphasized the opportunity to grow the WWE 2K franchise , noting that it could "double or triple" the size that it is now.
paragraphs.cn: Zelnick最近还强调了《WWE 2K》系列的增长机会，指出其规模可能「翻倍或三倍」。

paragraphs.en: “I do think there's ongoing opportunities to improve the quality of the game," he said. "I do think that we can give consumers more of what they want. And I know our team at Visual Concepts always wants to do better. We're never in the business of patting ourselves on the back. We believe that arrogance is the enemy of continued success. And I think that title could be double or triple the size that it is as long as we delight consumers, and as long as we give them something new and not expected that's consistent with the brand that they love. That's our job.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我确实认为游戏质量还有持续提升的机会，」他说，「我确实认为我们可以给消费者更多他们想要的东西。我知道我们Visual Concepts的团队总是想做得更好。我们从不自满。我们相信傲慢是持续成功的敌人。我认为只要能让消费者满意，只要我们能给他们带来符合他们喜爱的品牌、新颖且出乎意料的东西，这个系列就能翻倍或三倍。这就是我们的工作。」

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人。他报道所有娱乐内容，包括游戏、电影等。你可以在Twitter @Cade_Onder上找到他。

translated_terms.Becoming Ageless: The Four Secrets To Lo: 《Becoming Ageless: The Four Secrets To Looking and Feeling Younger Than Ever》
